XianYumApi/xianyum-common/src/main/java/.general_idea: Replace the old IpDbSearcher utility with the new IpSearcher utility from the ip2region library.

XianYumApi/xianyum-common/src/main/java/.before:

XianYumApi/xianyum-common/src/main/java/.after:

... IpSearcher searcher = IpSearcher.newWithVectorIndex(dbFilePath, vIndex);

XianYumApi/xianyum-common/src/main/java/.general_idea: Remove the automatic download fallback logic for the IP database file.
XianYumApi/xianyum-common/src/main/java/.why_exists: The automatic download logic is removed, so the code must explicitly check for file existence and fail if missing, rather than attempting to download.

XianYumApi/xianyum-common/src/main/java/.general_idea: Replace Spring Boot configuration properties binding with a custom static accessor that reads configuration from a system constant utility.
XianYumApi/xianyum-common/src/main/java/.why_exists: The class is no longer a Spring-managed bean, so Spring will not inject properties; the new logic requires the SystemConstantUtils to be available and configured.

XianYumApi/xianyum-common/src/main/java/.general_idea: Update static field initialization to use the new instance-based configuration accessor pattern.

XianYumApi/xianyum-common/src/main/java/.general_idea: Update method body to use the new instance-based configuration accessor pattern.
